capabilities_used.evidence: 整体表达长期偏多，反复把回调视作趋势中的买点。2024-09-27 说“Dips are for buying, don't flip bearish on the first pullback.”；2025-02-12 说“prices resolve higher from here”。
多次等待回踩后延续。2024-10-30 说“$SOL Looking for a continuation play on a sweep of Monday's low if the market offers it”；2025-01-31 说“Close this weekly strong and then I think we're ready for the next leg”。

这是他最显著的执行框架之一。2024-09-30 明确写“Sweep of last week's low and all those equal lows and then reclaim the quarterly open”；2025-01-31 说“another sweep of the local lows into monthly demand”。图3也在多个局部高低点画出弧线，强调先扫流动性再走真实方向。
2026-04-11 明确给出规则：“Wait for a sweep of London's high/low. Wait for a 5 min FVG to form opposite the sweep. Enter on that FVG”。说明他直接使用 ICT/FVG 作为低周期入场触发。
他常讲“flip this level”“reclaim 136 to get an entry trigger”“reclaim the yearly open”。这类前阻力转支撑/前支撑转阻力的 level flip，本质接近 breaker / S/R flip。图3突破水平线后回踩附近结构，也符合此思路。
虽然不常公开谈均线参数，但他的语言经常是“reclaim”型确认，而不是盲抄底。这里更广义体现在关键参考位收回确认。2024-08-30：“reclaim 136 to get an entry trigger”。
2024-05-30 直接描述区间交易思路：“In a ranging market I want to see stops taken out, then reversals.” 这就是典型区间边缘反手，不追中间。
他能明确区分趋势盘和震荡盘。2024-05-30 说“as the market chops, my attention shifts towards where I believe there is liquidity”；2025-02-12 也提到“regardless of how long this range lasts”。
图3核心就是多次突破/跌破后回到区间内部；2024-10-31 高赞文案先调侃“double top, bull market over...”随后反向看多，说明他经常把明显形态的共识解读为陷阱。
图2在 BTC 周线前高处画出水平阻力，明显是双顶/前高测试语境；但他常把市场过度解读的“双顶见顶论”拿来反向操作，2024-10-31 用讽刺口吻否定“double top, bull market over”。
2024-12-31 直接说“Nice double bottom forming on $M3M3 and up 50% off the lows”。说明双底是他会识别并交易的标准反转结构。
图3在若干次回踩低点处画出重复圆弧，强调多次底部测试后的结构性反转。虽然没直接用“三重底”字眼，但图像表达明显。
他明显偏好山寨轮动和 SOL 生态。2024-03-30：“SOL is here”；2024-05-29：“Solana is the future”；2024-09-30：“Memes are catching a bid and showing some strength during pullbacks”。说明他关注 BTC 后的 beta 扩散。
多次用“this cycle”“previous ATH's this cycle”来给 SOL、BTC 做上行预期，图4 ETH 月线和图5 SOL 周线也是典型周期视角，而不是只盯短线。
图2、图4、图5都用多年级别大结构；2024-04-30 的“jan 2021 fractal plays out?”与图1蓝色路径也说明他习惯把当前周期映射到前一轮周期阶段。
图4在 ETH 2021 抛物线启动附近特别圈出加速段，图5对 SOL 给出大级别上行空间时也是基于历史抛物扩张阶段判断；他会利用抛物线趋势，但也意识到后期会衰竭。
图3和图2都强调前高前低附近的 wick rejection；他公开表达中常围绕“sweep then reclaim”，本质上需要长针或假破后的收回。
虽不以风险管理内容出名，但 2026-04-10 明确做过复盘：“What happens when you don't TAKE PARTIALS? BLEW UP~~ Full transparency!” 说明他重视执行错误的纠偏。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Yearly/Quarterly Open Reclaim
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 年开盘价/季开盘价收复
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses yearly open, quarterly open, or monthly open as high-timeframe pivot levels. A reclaim after a sweep or pullback is treated as a confirmation trigger for continuation higher.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把年开盘价、季开盘价、月开盘价作为高时间框架枢轴位；价格在扫流动性或回调后重新收复这些开盘位，被视为趋势延续确认。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-01-31：“reclaim the yearly open and I think we push higher”; 2024-09-30：“reclaim the quarterly open”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Historical Fractal Analog Projection
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 历史分形类比路径投射
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Maps the current market structure onto a prior cycle segment and projects a likely path forward, usually visually with an overlaid blue path.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把当前市场结构映射到上一轮某个历史阶段，利用相似走势进行路径投射，通常会在图上直接叠加未来预期路线。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-04-30：“wyd if the jan 2021 fractal plays out?”；图1用蓝色路径把 2024 结构类比到 2021 年 1 月后的延续上冲。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sweep Then Reclaim Trigger
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Wait for price to run obvious equal highs/lows or prior session/week levels, then reclaim a key reference level before entering in the opposite direction.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 先等价格扫掉明显等高/等低、上周高低点或会话高低点，再等待收回关键参考位后反向入场。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-09-30：“Sweep of last week's low and all those equal lows and then reclaim the quarterly open”; 2025-01-31：“sweep of the local lows into monthly demand”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Monthly SR Mapping
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Derives trade bias from monthly support/resistance bands and maps likely summer or multi-month paths around those zones.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 围绕月线级别支撑阻力带建立交易偏向，并据此推演未来数周到数月的震荡或突破路径。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图1在 61.3k 与 58.8k 一带明确标注“Monthly S/R”，并给出更深回调或夏季横盘的路径；2024-04-30 文字也说“Deeper pullback scenario would be 52k... chop for most of the summer”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: London Sweep FVG Setup
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 伦敦高低点扫单 + 5分钟 FVG
new_capabilities_proposed.description: A session-based intraday setup: wait for London high/low to be swept, wait for an opposing 5-minute fair value gap, enter at the FVG, and target the other side of the session range.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 会话制日内策略：等待伦敦时段高点或低点被扫，再等待相反方向的 5 分钟 FVG 形成，在 FVG 入场，目标看向另一侧伦敦高低点。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-04-11 逐条写出完整流程：“1) Wait for a sweep of London's high/low. 2) Wait for a 5 min FVG... 3) Enter on that FVG...”

personal_quirks.quote: Dips are for buying, don't flip bearish on the first pullback.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 大级别结构未破前，第一次像样回调默认是机会，不是反转确认。

personal_quirks.quote: As the market chops, my attention shifts towards where I believe there is liquidity. In a ranging market I want to see stops taken out, then reversals.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 震荡市不追方向，优先寻找流动性堆积区，等扫损后反手。

personal_quirks.quote: What happens when you don't TAKE PARTIALS? BLEW UP~~ Full transparency! BIG L for today's stream 🥹
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不分批止盈会显著放大回撤，执行管理失误值得公开复盘。

personal_quirks.quote: If you sell your bags because of CPI, you've completely lost the plot
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不要被单次宏观事件噪音打断更大的周期/结构性交易逻辑。

personal_quirks.quote: Choosing not to take other people’s trades has helped me more than anything
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 坚持独立分析，不机械复制他人 setup。

unique_traits: 他不是纯 ICT 也不是纯经典形态派，而是把高时间框架趋势叙事、前高前低流动性、关键开盘位收复和情绪反身性揉在一起用。与很多 TA 交易员不同，他极度偏好多头周期框架，常把市场最显眼的看空共识解释为陷阱。另一个明显特征是图表表达非常“路径化”，喜欢用分形、月线 S/R 和扫流动性后的回收来做未来路线图。

high_conviction_phrases: I think we're ready for the next leg
I don't think it pulls back that far
low_conviction_phrases: let's see if we can reclaim
